announcement.label: Welcome to Northfield Student
announcement.title: 🚀 Official Launch: Student Game Hub
announcement.body:
Welcome to the Student Game Hub!

This is a website built by students for students to enjoy games during free time.

More features and games will be added soon. Stay tuned!

欢迎来到学生游戏站！
这是一个由学生搭建的网站，大家可以在空闲时间放松娱乐。
后续会持续更新更多游戏和功能，敬请期待！

terms.title: Rules and Terms
terms.intro: This site is designed to provide a fun, safe, and school-appropriate environment for students to enjoy games and relax during their free time. Please be respectful and follow the guidelines below.
items: Use the site respectfully and responsibly.
Do not attempt to hack, spam, or disrupt the platform.
Keep all interactions school-appropriate and respectful.
Only submit feedback that is helpful and appropriate.
Follow all school policies while using this site.
The site owner or school staff may remove content or restrict access if needed.
